name: phaser4-gamedev
description: Phaser 4 game development toolkit with portable skills for scaffolding, architecture, coding, debugging, assets, physics, migration, UI, build, and analysis.

interface.shortDescription: Build, debug, and ship Phaser 4 games with Codex skills.
interface.longDescription: A Phaser 4 game development toolkit for Codex and compatible coding agents. Includes portable skills for project initialization, scene design, game objects, physics, Matter.js, input, audio, animation, UI, tilemaps, mobile, save/load, migration, GDD generation, brownfield analysis, architecture, implementation, debugging, and asset pipeline work.
defaultPrompt: Create a Phaser 4 platformer with TypeScript.
Debug my Phaser 4 black screen issue.
Plan the architecture for my Phaser game.
